message:
refactor: drive raw-query flag + mail address list parsing (#267)

* refactor(cmd): centralize all literal

* feat(drive): add --raw-query to search

* refactor(gmail): parse comma-separated address lists

files.patch:
@@ -5,7 +5,7 @@ import "github.com/steipete/gogcli/internal/googleapi"
 var newCalendarService = googleapi.NewCalendar
 
 const (
-	scopeAll    = "all"
+	scopeAll    = literalAll
 	scopeSingle = "single"
 	scopeFuture = "future"
 )

@@ -14,9 +14,9 @@ const (
 	defaultFocusSummary     = "Focus Time"
 	defaultOOOSummary       = "Out of office"
 	defaultOOODeclineMsg    = "I am out of office and will respond when I return."
-	defaultFocusAutoDecline = "all"
+	defaultFocusAutoDecline = literalAll
 	defaultFocusChatStatus  = "doNotDisturb"
-	defaultOOOAutoDecline   = "all"
+	defaultOOOAutoDecline   = literalAll
 )
 
 func normalizeEventType(raw string) (string, error) {

@@ -0,0 +1,10 @@
+package cmd
+
+// Shared string literals used across multiple command groups.
+//
+// Motivation: some linters (e.g. goconst) encourage consolidating repeated
+// literals across the package; keeping them in one place avoids accidental
+// coupling to unrelated semantic constants.
+const (
+	literalAll = "all"
+)
